subcodes.first_line: O Servant of God, (most) people are expecting a bloodthirsty Promised One, and a brutal oppressor as a protector. They want a promised one who, with shaft and spear
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق جمهور ناس منتظر موعودی خونخوارند و ولی ظالمی غدار مهدی ای خواهند
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies, @compassion; kindness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @station of the Manifestation of God
